title: AN ACT DECLARING EVERY 28THDAY OF MAY AS ARAW NG LABANAN SA ALAPAN, A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IMUS, CAVITE

chunks.text:
H. No. 3278 / 97 OG No. 31, 4555 (July 30, 2001) ; Standard 5/3/01

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9091, April 08, 2001 ]

AN ACT DECLARING EVERY 28

TH

DAY OF MAY AS ARAW NG LABANAN SA ALAPAN, A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IMUS, CAVITE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. May 28 of every year is hereby declared as Araw ng Labanan sa Alapan a special working public holiday in the Municipality of Imus, Cavite, in commemoration of the historic "Labanan sa Alapan."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect immediately after its publication in two (2) newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 6, 2001 and October 2, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 08, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
